prompt: I want to add caching to the CLI

assertions.name: asks-clarifying-question
assertions.description: First response asks at least one clarifying question rather than jumping to design

assertions.name: offers-options
assertions.description: Provides multiple-choice options for at least one question

assertions.name: single-question-focus
assertions.description: Asks 1-2 questions max per message, not a wall of 5+
